title: Random Stuff
description: This is a mod of lots of random stuff so it does not have one topic.
body: This is a mod that will add al sorts of stuff from new items to new dimension. So far in this mod ther is some new armour like Steel and Star Light. Also right now we have a new ore in the end That makes a new set of armour and tools which ios a upgrade from netherite tools and the nether star armour which you use the new craftible starlight template which is made from a nether star template on of the new ore and end ston.and a new set of armour for nether stars which has a special wepon that is a upgraded trident with more damage and a affect when the projectile hits and the armour is a upgrade to netherite armour with the new smithing templat made with glow ston and a nether star and a smithing tempalte. Also this mod add steel which is smeted iron and can be used to make a very blast resistan block which is  a block of steel and a new armour which is very protective also it adds a new block the super furnace which can smelt ores instantly and is the one way to smelt the star light ore to bars.Also you can get uranium to get nukes,acid, and a remote detinator.
